elements.original_description: A collection of consumer items, including a car, a house, a smartphone, and a TV, arranged neatly on a pure white background. Each item is brightly colored and stylized with simple, clean lines.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon. A clean collection of consumer items arranged neatly on a pure white background. The items are a car, a house, a smartphone, and a TV. Each item is brightly colored and stylized with simple, clean lines. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. The mood is defined by a sense of accumulation and possession.
